binding.sourceFeatureSubject: Review Bridge first useful release public boundary and live smoke truth repair

internalReusePaths: main-owned local JSON packet intake delegates normalized session state into the internal importPacket helper
DOCX review preview activation delegates normalized session state into the internal importPacket helper

positiveClaims: The public Review Bridge command surface no longer exposes cmd.project.review.importPacket through the UI command bridge or public menu handlers.
cmd.project.review.importLocalPacket remains the only public local JSON review packet intake path.
The internal handleReviewSurfaceImportPacketCommandSurface helper remains reusable only behind main-owned session normalization flows.
The first useful release gate contract now fails closed by rerunning live Review Bridge smoke contracts for local packet import and DOCX review preview surfaces.
VM harnesses for the affected command-surface contracts now inject computed menu command ids explicitly so full MENU_COMMAND_HANDLERS extraction no longer false-reds on unrelated computed keys.
nonClaims: No new public review import command is introduced.
No new exact apply authority is introduced.
No DOCX tracked-change apply is introduced.
No DOCX safe-create or import preview behavior is widened.
No import/export MVP scope expansion is introduced.
No release readiness, packaged readiness, cross-platform readiness, or Y9 admission is claimed.
layerDecisions: Public boundary truth is narrowed without changing the internal session-normalization helper contract.
Main remains the only owner of local file authority for local JSON packet intake and DOCX review local-file activation.
Gate truth is carried by live smoke execution instead of regex-only or status-only green.

docsBinding.reason: CONTEXT and HANDOFF carry active branch truth for this bounded repair contour; WORKLOG records the truth-repair step without widening Review Bridge scope.
